'&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const headers = new Headers(options.headers ?? {});\n\n    if (!(options.body instanceof FormData)) {\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n    }\n\n    const token = this.token || readAuthToken();\n    if (token) {\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(url, {\n      ...options,\n      headers,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Request failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    return data as T;\n  }\n\n  // GET\n  async get<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'GET' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // POST\n  async post<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'POST',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PUT\n  async put<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PUT',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PATCH\n  async patch<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PATCH',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // DELETE\n  async delete<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'DELETE' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // File upload (multipart)\n  async upload<T>(\n    endpoint: string,\n    file: File,\n    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>,\n    options?: ApiOptions\n  ): Promise<T> {\n    const apiUrl = resolveApiBaseUrl();\n    let url = endpoint;\n    if (options?.tenantSlug) {\n      url = url.replace('/api/', `/api/${options.tenantSlug}/`);\n    }\n\n    if (options?.sucursalId) {\n      const separator = url.includes('?') ? '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${options.sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const formData = new FormData();\n    formData.append('file', file);\n    if (metadata) {\n      formData.append('metadata', JSON.stringify(metadata));\n    }\n\n    const headers: HeadersInit = {};\n    if (this.token) {\n      headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}${url}`, {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers,\n      body: formData,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Upload failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json();\n    return data as T;\n  }\n}\n\nexport const '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const headers = new Headers(options.headers ?? {});\n\n    if (!(options.body instanceof FormData)) {\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n    }\n\n    const token = this.token || readAuthToken();\n    if (token) {\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(url, {\n      ...options,\n      headers,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Request failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    return data as T;\n  }\n\n  // GET\n  async get<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'GET' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // POST\n  async post<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'POST',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PUT\n  async put<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PUT',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PATCH\n  async patch<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PATCH',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // DELETE\n  async delete<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'DELETE' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // File upload (multipart)\n  async upload<T>(\n    endpoint: string,\n    file: File,\n    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>,\n    options?: ApiOptions\n  ): Promise<T> {\n    const apiUrl = resolveAdminApiBaseUrl();\n    let url = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;\n    if (options?.tenantSlug) {\n      url = url.replace('/api/', `/api/${options.tenantSlug}/`);\n    }\n\n    if (options?.sucursalId) {\n      const separator = url.includes('?') ? '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${options.sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const formData = new FormData();\n    formData.append('file', file);\n    if (metadata) {\n      formData.append('metadata', JSON.stringify(metadata));\n    }\n\n    const headers: HeadersInit = {};\n    if (this.token) {\n      headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/api${url}`, {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers,\n      body: formData,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Upload failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json();\n    return data as T;\n '@/lib/tenant';\nimport { apiClient } from '@/lib/api-client';\nimport { getTenantSlug } from '@/lib/tenant';\nimport type { Sucursal } from '@/types';\n\nexport function BranchSelector() {\n  const [sucursales, setSucursales] = useState<Sucursal[]>([]);\n  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n  const showConsolidated = canUseConsolidatedView();\n\n  const loadSucursales = async () => {\n    try {\n      const data = await apiClient.get<{ data: Sucursal[] }>('/sucursales', {\n        tenantSlug: getTenantSlug() || undefined,\n      });\n      const active = getActiveSucursalId();\n      setSucursales(data.data || []);\n      setActiveId(active);\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Failed to load sucursales:', error);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    loadSucursales();\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleSelect = (sucursalId: string | null) => {\n    setActiveSucursalId(sucursalId);\n    setActiveId(sucursalId);\n    setOpen(false);\n  };\n\n  const getActiveLabel = () => {\n    if (activeId === 'GLOBAL') );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"relative\">\n      <button\n        onClick={() => setOpen(!open)}\n        className=\"flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg bg-srf-surface/50 <ChevronDown className=\"w-4 h-4 text-srf-muted\" />\n      </button>\n\n      {open && (\n        <>\n          <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-40\" onClick={() => setOpen(false)} />\n          <div className=\"absolute top-full left-0 mt-2 w-64 rounded-lg bg-srf-surface border border-srf-primary/30 shadow-lg z-50 overflow-hidden\">\n            <div className=\"p-2\">\n '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const headers = new Headers(options.headers ?? {});\n\n    if (!(options.body instanceof FormData)) {\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n    }\n\n    const token = this.token || readAuthToken();\n    if (token) {\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(url, {\n      ...options,\n      headers,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Request failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    return data as T;\n  }\n\n  // GET\n  async get<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'GET' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // POST\n  async post<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'POST',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PUT\n  async put<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PUT',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PATCH\n  async patch<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PATCH',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // DELETE\n  async delete<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'DELETE' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // File upload (multipart)\n  async upload<T>(\n    endpoint: string,\n    file: File,\n    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>,\n    options?: ApiOptions\n  ): Promise<T> {\n    const apiUrl = resolveApiBaseUrl();\n    let url = endpoint;\n    if (options?.tenantSlug) {\n      url = url.replace('/api/', `/api/${options.tenantSlug}/`);\n    }\n\n    if (options?.sucursalId) {\n      const separator = url.includes('?') ? '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${options.sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const formData = new FormData();\n    formData.append('file', file);\n    if (metadata) {\n      formData.append('metadata', JSON.stringify(metadata));\n    }\n\n    const headers: HeadersInit = {};\n    if (this.token) {\n      headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}${url}`, {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers,\n      body: formData,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Upload failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json();\n    return data as T;\n  }\n}\n\nexport const (sucursalId: string | null) => {\n    setActiveSucursalId(sucursalId);\n    setActiveId(sucursalId);\n    setOpen(false);\n  };\n\n  const getActiveLabel = () => {\n    if (activeId === 'GLOBAL') '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const headers = new Headers(options.headers ?? {});\n\n    if (!(options.body instanceof FormData)) {\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n    }\n\n    const token = this.token || readAuthToken();\n    if (token) {\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(url, {\n      ...options,\n      headers,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Request failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    return data as T;\n  }\n\n  // GET\n  async get<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'GET' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // POST\n  async post<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'POST',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PUT\n  async put<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PUT',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PATCH\n  async patch<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PATCH',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // DELETE\n  async delete<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'DELETE' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // File upload (multipart)\n  async upload<T>(\n    endpoint: string,\n    file: File,\n    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>,\n    options?: ApiOptions\n  ): Promise<T> {\n    const apiUrl = resolveApiBaseUrl();\n    let url = endpoint;\n    if (options?.tenantSlug) {\n      url = url.replace('/api/', `/api/${options.tenantSlug}/`);\n    }\n\n    if (options?.sucursalId) {\n      const separator = url.includes('?') ? formData.append('metadata', JSON.stringify(metadata));\n    }\n\n    const headers: HeadersInit = {};\n    if (this.token) {\n      headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;\n    }\n\n => ({ error: 'Upload failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json();\n    return data as T;\n  }\n}\n\nexport const decoded.tenant_slug.trim() : \"\";\n  const tenantId = typeof decoded.tenant_id === \"string\" ? decoded.tenant_id.trim() : \"\";\n  const email = typeof decoded.email === \"string\" ? decoded.email.trim() : \"\";\n  const role = typeof decoded.role === \"string\" ? } from '@/types';\n\ninterface LoginResponse {\n  token: string;\n  user: User;\n  tenant: Tenant;\n}\n\ninterface ExchangeResponse {\n  token: string;\n  user: User;\n  tenant: Tenant;\n}\n\nexport async function exchangeSupabaseSession(accessToken: string): Promise<ExchangeResponse> {\n  const apiUrl = resolveApiBaseUrl();\n\n  const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/api/auth/exchange`, {\n    method: 'POST',\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n    body: JSON.stringify({ accessToken }),\n  });\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Exchange failed' }));\n    throw new Error(error.error || 'Authentication failed');\n  }\n\n  const data = await response.json();\n  return {\n    token: data.token,\n    user: data.user,\n    tenant: data.tenant,\n  };\n}\n\nexport async function loginWithSupabase(accessToken: string): Promise<LoginResponse> {\n  const { token, user, tenant } = await exchangeSupabaseSession(accessToken);\n  apiClient.setToken(token);\n\n  saveAuthToken(token, true);\n  localStorage.setItem('srf_token', token);\n  localStorage.setItem('srf_user', JSON.stringify(user));\n  localStorage.setItem('srf_tenant', JSON.stringify(tenant));\n\n  return { token, user, tenant };\n}\n\nexport function logout() {\n  apiClient.clearToken();\n  clearAuthToken();\n  localStorage.removeItem('srf_token');\n  localStorage.removeItem('srf_user');\n  localStorage.removeItem('srf_tenant');\n  localStorage.removeItem('srf_sucursal_activa');\n  window.location.href = '/login';\n}\n\nexport function getStoredToken(): string | null {\n  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return null;\n  return localStorage.getItem('srf_token') || readAuthToken();\n}\n\nexport function getStoredUser(): User | null {\n  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return null;\n  const session = getCurrentSession();\n  if (session) {\n    return {\n      id: session.email || session.tenantId,\n      email: session.email,\n      name: session.email || 'Usuario activo',\n      role: (session.role as User['role']) || 'manager',\n      tenantId: session.tenantId,\n      tenantSlug: session.tenantSlug,\n      sucursalId: session.sucursalId ?? null,\n      sessionId: session.token,\n    };\n  }\n  const user = localStorage.getItem('srf_user');\n  if (!user) return null;\n  try {\n    return JSON.parse(user);\n  } catch {\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function getStoredTenant(): Tenant | null {\n  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return null;\n  const session = getCurrentSession();\n  if (session) {\n    return {\n      id: session.tenantId,\n      slug: session.tenantSlug,\n      name: \"@/lib/pwa/offline-queue\";\nimport { resolveAdminApiBaseUrl } from \"@/lib/api-base-url\";\n\nclass FixService {\n  private get apiUrl() {\n    return resolveAdminApiBaseUrl();\n  }\n\n  private apiPath(path: string) {\n    const normalizedPath = path.startsWith('/') ? path : `/${path}`;\n    return `/api${normalizedPath}`;\n  }\n\n  private get tenantId() {\n    const session = getCurrentSession();\n    if (session?.tenantId) {\n      return session.tenantId;\n    }\n    throw new Error(\"Sesión inválida: tenant_id ausente\");\n  }\n\n  private getToken(): string {\n    if (typeof window === 'undefined') {\n      return '';\n    }\n    return readAuthToken() || '';\n  }\n\n  private getSucursalId() {\n    return getActiveScope()?.sucursalId ?? '';\n  }\n\n  private getScopeHeaders() {\n    const sucursalId = this.getSucursalId();\n    return sucursalId\n      ? {\n          'x-fixi-sucursal-id': sucursalId,\n          'x-sucursal-id': sucursalId,\n        }\n      : null;\n  }\n\n  private async request<T>(path: string, init: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {\n    const token = this.getToken();\n\n    if (!token) {\n      throw new Error('No hay sesión activa. Vuelve a iniciar sesión.');\n    }\n\n    const method = String(init.method ?? 'GET').toUpperCase();\n    const isMutation = !['GET', 'HEAD', 'OPTIONS'].includes(method);\n    const body = typeof init.body === 'string' ? init.body : null;\n\n    if (typeof navigator !== 'undefined' && !navigator.onLine && isMutation) {\n      const session = getCurrentSession();\n      await enqueueOfflineRequest({\n        tenantId: session?.tenantId ?? this.tenantId,\n        url: `${this.apiUrl}${path}`,\n        method,\n        headers: {\n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        },\n        body,\n      });\n      throw new Error('Acción guardada sin conexión. Se sincronizará al reconectar.');\n    }\n\n    let response: Response;\n    try {\n      const headers = new Headers(init.headers);\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n\n      const scopeHeaders = this.getScopeHeaders();\n      if (scopeHeaders) {\n        headers.set('x-fixi-sucursal-id', scopeHeaders['x-fixi-sucursal-id']);\n        headers.set('x-sucursal-id', scopeHeaders['x-sucursal-id']);\n      }\n\n      response = await fetch(`${this.apiUrl}${path}`, {\n        ...init,\n        headers,\n      });\n    } catch (err) {\n      // network or fetch-level error\n      throw new Error(`Network error: ${(err as Error).message}`);\n    }\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const payload = await response.json().catch(() => ({} as ApiErrorResponse));\n      // prefer structured payload messages when available\n      const message =\n        (payload && typeof (payload as any).message === 'string' && (payload as any).message) ||\n        (payload && typeof payload.error === 'string' && payload.error) ||\n        `HTTP ${response.status}`;\n      const details = (payload as ApiErrorResponse).details ? ` - ${JSON.stringify((payload as ApiErrorResponse).details)}` : '';\n\n      if (\n        response.status === 401 &&\n        /invalid token signature|token expired|session revoked|missing or invalid authorization header|unauthorized/i.test(message)\n      ) {\n        clearAuthToken();\n        if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {\n          window.location.replace('/login');\n        }\n      }\n\n      throw new Error(`${message}${details}`);\n    }\n\n    return response.json() as Promise<T>;\n  }\n\n  private normalizeCustomerRow(row: JsonRecord): JsonRecord {\n    return {\n      ...row,\n      name: String(row.name ?? row.full_name ?? ''),\n      full_name: String(row.full_name ?? row.name ?? ''),\n      phone: typeof row.phone === 'string' ? row.phone : '',\n      email: typeof row.email === 'string' ? row.email : '',\n    };\n  }\n\n  private normalizeServiceRequestRow(row: JsonRecord): ServiceRequestPayload {\n    const normalizedStatus = String(\n      row.normalized_status ??\n      row.status ??\n      'pendiente'\n    ).trim().toLowerCase();\n\n    return {\n      ...row,\n      normalized_status: normalizedStatus,\n      customer_name: String(row.customer_name ?? value = typeof reader.result === 'string' ? reader.result : '';\n        resolve(value);\n      };\n      reader.onerror = () => reject(new Error('No se pudo leer el archivo'));\n defaultLandingContent.secondaryCtaHref,\n    contactLabel: input?.contactLabel?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.contactLabel,\n    contactHref: input?.contactHref?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.contactHref,\n    seoTitle: input?.seoTitle?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.seoTitle,\n    seoDescription: input?.seoDescription?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.seoDescription,\n    services: Array.isArray(input?.services) && input?.services.length > 0 ? input.services : [emptyService],\n    socialLinks: Array.isArray(input?.socialLinks) && input?.socialLinks.length > 0 ? input.socialLinks : [emptySocial],\n    showMap: Boolean(input?.showMap),\n    mapEmbedUrl: input?.mapEmbedUrl?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.mapEmbedUrl,\n    showVideo: Boolean(input?.showVideo),\n    videoUrl: input?.videoUrl?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.videoUrl,\n  };\n}\n\nfunction toPublicHref(tenantSlug: string, href: string) {\n  if (!href) return \"#\";\n  if (href.startsWith(\"http://\") || href.startsWith(\"https://\") || href.startsWith(\"mailto:\") || href.startsWith(\"tel:\")) {\n    return href;\n  }\n  const normalized = href.startsWith(\"/\") ? href : `/${href}`;\n  return `/${encodeURIComponent(tenantSlug)}${normalized}`;\n}\n\nexport default function LandingSettingsPage() {\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [success, setSuccess] = useState(\"\");\n  const [settings, setSettings] = useState<TenantLandingSettings | null>(null);\n  const [landingContent, setLandingContent] = useState<LandingContent>(defaultLandingContent);\n  const [industryKey, setIndustryKey] = useState<string>(DEFAULT_INDUSTRY_KEY);\n\n  async function load() {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      setError(\"\");\n      const result = await fixService.getTenantLandingSettings();\n      setSettings(result.data);\n      setLandingContent(normalizeLandingContent(result.data.tenant.landing_content ?? null));\n      setIndustryKey(typeof result.data.tenant.industry_profile?.industry_key === \"string\" ? result.data.tenant.industry_profile.industry_key : DEFAULT_INDUSTRY_KEY);\n    } catch (err) {\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Error al cargar la landing\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    void load();\n  }, []);\n\n  const tenantSlug = settings?.tenant.slug ?? \"\";\n  const preview = useMemo(() => ({\n    primaryHref: toPublicHref(tenantSlug, landingContent.primaryCtaHref),\n    secondaryHref: toPublicHref(tenantSlug, landingContent.secondaryCtaHref),\n    contactHref: toPublicHref(tenantSlug, landingContent.contactHref),\n  }), [landingContent.contactHref, landingContent.primaryCtaHref, landingContent.secondaryCtaHref, tenantSlug]);\n\n  const updateField = <K extends keyof LandingContent>(key: K, value: LandingContent[K]) => {\n    setLandingContent((current) => ({ ...current, [key]: value }));\n  };\n\n  const updateService = (index: number, key: keyof LandingService, value: string) => {\n    setLandingContent((current) => ({\n      ...current,\n      services: current.services.map((service, idx) => (idx === index ? { ...service, [key]: value } : service)),\n    }));\n  };\n\n  const updateSocial = (index: number, key: keyof SocialLink, value: string) => {\n    setLandingContent((current) => ({\n      ...current,\n      socialLinks: current.socialLinks.map((item, idx) => (idx === index ? { ...item, [key]: value } : item)),\n    }));\n  };\n\n  const addService = () => setLandingContent((current) => ({ ...current, services: [...current.services, { ...emptyService }] }));\n  const addSocial = () => setLandingContent((current) => ({ ...current, socialLinks: [...current.socialLinks, { ...emptySocial }] }));\n\n  async function handleSave() {\n    setSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    setSuccess(\"\");\n\n    try {\n      const selectedIndustry = settings?.availableIndustries?.find((item) => item.key === industryKey) ?? null;\n      const result = await fixService.updateTenantLandingSettings({\n        branding: settings?.tenant.branding ?? undefined,\n        landingContent,\n        industryProfile: {\n          industry_key: industryKey,\n          industry_label: selectedIndustry?.label ?? settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.industry_label ?? null,\n          asset_label: settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.asset_label ?? null,\n          order_label: settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.order_label ?? null,\n          request_label: settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.request_label ?? null,\n          customer_label: settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.customer_label ?? null,\n          portal_label: settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.portal_label ?? null,\n          quote_label: settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.quote_label ?? null,\n          default_workflow_key: selectedIndustry?.defaultWorkflowKey ?? settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.default_workflow_key ?? \"service_orders\",\n          is_active: true,\n          metadata: { source: \"dashboard_landing_editor\" },\n        },\n      });\n\n      setSettings(result.data);\n      setLandingContent(normalizeLandingContent(result.data.tenant.landing_content ?? null));\n      setSuccess(\"Landing guardada correctamente.\");\n    } catch (err) {\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Error al guardar landing\");\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return <div className=\"flex h-full items-center justify-center\"><div className=\"spinner w-8 h-8\" /></div>;\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <div className=\"flex flex-col gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between\">\n        <div>\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-orbitron font-bold text-srf-primary\">Landing</h1>\n          <p className=\"mt-1 text-sm text-srf-muted\">Configura la landing pública del tenant {settings?.tenant.name ?? tenantSlug}.</p>\n        </div>\n        <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n          <button onClick={() => void load()} className=\"btn-outline inline-flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <RefreshCw className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n            Recargar\n          </button>\n          <button onClick={() => void handleSave()} className=\"btn-primary inline-flex items-center gap-2\" disabled={saving}>\n            <Save className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n            {saving ? \"Guardando...\" : \"Guardar\"}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {error ? <div className=\"rounded-lg border border-red-500/30 bg-red-500/10 p-3 text-sm className=\"grid gap-6 xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1.5fr)_minmax(360px,1fr)]\">\n        <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n          <div className=\"card space-y-4\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-srf-primary\"><Globe className=\"w-5 h-5\" /><h2 className=\"text-lg font-semibold\">Hero</h2></div>\n            <div className=\"grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2\">\n              <input value={landingContent.heroTitle} onChange={(e) => updateField(\"heroTitle\", e.target.value)} className=\"input\" placeholder=\"Título principal\" />\n              <input value={landingContent.heroDescription} onChange={(e) => updateField(\"heroDescription\", e.target.value)} className=\"input min-h-28 md:col-span-2\" placeholder=\"Descripción principal\" />\n '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const headers = new Headers(options.headers ?? {});\n\n    if (!(options.body instanceof FormData)) {\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n    }\n\n    const token = this.token || readAuthToken();\n    if (token) {\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(url, {\n      ...options,\n      headers,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Request failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    return data as T;\n  }\n\n  // GET\n  async get<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'GET' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // POST\n  async post<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'POST',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PUT\n  async put<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PUT',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PATCH\n  async patch<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PATCH',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // DELETE\n  async delete<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'DELETE' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // File upload (multipart)\n  async upload<T>(\n    endpoint: string,\n    file: File,\n    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>,\n    options?: ApiOptions\n  ): Promise<T> {\n    const apiUrl = resolveAdminApiBaseUrl();\n    let url = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;\n    if (options?.tenantSlug) {\n      url = url.replace('/api/', `/api/${options.tenantSlug}/`);\n    }\n\n    if (options?.sucursalId) {\n      const separator = url.includes('?') ? '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${options.sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const formData = new FormData();\n    formData.append('file', file);\n    if (metadata) {\n      formData.append('metadata', JSON.stringify(metadata));\n    }\n\n    const headers: HeadersInit = {};\n    if (this.token) {\n      headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/api${url}`, {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers,\n      body: formData,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await Vuelve a iniciar sesión.');\n    }\n\n    const method = String(init.method ?? 'GET').toUpperCase();\n    const isMutation = !['GET', 'HEAD', 'OPTIONS'].includes(method);\n    const body = typeof init.body === 'string' ? init.body : null;\n\n    if (typeof navigator !== 'undefined' && !navigator.onLine && isMutation) {\n      const session = getCurrentSession();\n      await enqueueOfflineRequest({\n        tenantId: session?.tenantId ?? this.tenantId,\n        url: `${this.apiUrl}${path}`,\n        method,\n        headers: {\n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        },\n        body,\n      });\n      throw new Error('Acción guardada sin conexión. Se sincronizará al reconectar.');\n    }\n\n    let response: Response;\n    try {\n      const headers = new Headers(init.headers);\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n\n      const scopeHeaders = this.getScopeHeaders();\n      if (scopeHeaders) {\n        headers.set('x-fixi-sucursal-id', scopeHeaders['x-fixi-sucursal-id']);\n        headers.set('x-sucursal-id', scopeHeaders['x-sucursal-id']);\n      }\n\n      response = await fetch(`${this.apiUrl}${path}`, {\n        ...init,\n        headers,\n      });\n    } catch (err) {\n      // network or fetch-level error\n      throw new Error(`Network error: ${(err as Error).message}`);\n    }\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const payload = await response.json().catch(() => ({} as ApiErrorResponse));\n      // prefer structured payload messages when available\n      const message =\n        (payload && typeof (payload as any).message === 'string' && (payload as any).message) ||\n        (payload && typeof payload.error === 'string' && payload.error) ||\n        `HTTP ${response.status}`;\n      const details = (payload as ApiErrorResponse).details ? ` - ${JSON.stringify((payload as ApiErrorResponse).details)}` : '';\n\n      if (\n        response.status === 401 &&\n        /invalid token signature|token expired|session revoked|missing or invalid authorization header|unauthorized/i.test(message)\n      ) {\n        clearAuthToken();\n        if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {\n          window.location.replace('/login');\n        }\n      }\n\n      throw new Error(`${message}${details}`);\n    }\n\n    return response.json() as Promise<T>;\n  }\n\n  private normalizeCustomerRow(row: JsonRecord): JsonRecord {\n    return {\n      ...row,\n      name: String(row.name ?? row.full_name ?? '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const headers = new Headers(options.headers ?? {});\n\n    if (!(options.body instanceof FormData)) {\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n    }\n\n    const token = this.token || readAuthToken();\n    if (token) {\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(url, {\n      ...options,\n      headers,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Request failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    return data as T;\n  }\n\n  // GET\n  async get<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'GET' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // POST\n  async post<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'POST',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PUT\n  async put<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PUT',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PATCH\n  async patch<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PATCH',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // DELETE\n  async delete<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'DELETE' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // File upload (multipart)\n  async upload<T>(\n    endpoint: string,\n    file: File,\n    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>,\n    options?: ApiOptions\n  ): Promise<T> {\n    const apiUrl = resolveApiBaseUrl();\n    let url = endpoint;\n    if (options?.tenantSlug) {\n      url = url.replace('/api/', `/api/${options.tenantSlug}/`);\n    }\n\n    if (options?.sucursalId) {\n      const separator = url.includes('?') ? formData.append('metadata', JSON.stringify(metadata));\n    }\n\n    const headers: HeadersInit = {};\n    if (this.token) {\n      headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}${url}`, {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers,\n      body: formData,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() decoded.tenant_slug.trim() : \"\";\n  const tenantId = typeof decoded.tenant_id === \"string\" ? decoded.tenant_id.trim() : \"\";\n  const email = typeof decoded.email === \"string\" ? decoded.email.trim() : \"\";\n  const role = typeof decoded.role === \"string\" ? } from '@/types';\n\ninterface LoginResponse {\n  token: string;\n  user: User;\n  tenant: Tenant;\n}\n\ninterface ExchangeResponse {\n  token: string;\n  user: User;\n  tenant: Tenant;\n}\n\nexport async function exchangeSupabaseSession(accessToken: string): Promise<ExchangeResponse> {\n  const apiUrl = resolveAdminApiBaseUrl();\n\n  const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/api/auth/exchange`, {\n    method: 'POST',\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n    body: JSON.stringify({ accessToken }),\n  });\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Exchange failed' }));\n    throw new Error(error.error || 'Authentication failed');\n  }\n\n  const data = await response.json();\n  return {\n    token: data.token,\n    user: data.user,\n    tenant: data.tenant,\n  };\n}\n\nexport async function loginWithSupabase(accessToken: string): Promise<LoginResponse> {\n  const { token, user, tenant } = await '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const headers = new Headers(options.headers ?? {});\n\n    if (!(options.body instanceof FormData)) {\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n    }\n\n    const token = this.token || readAuthToken();\n    if (token) {\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(url, {\n      ...options,\n      headers,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Request failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    return data as T;\n  }\n\n  // GET\n  async get<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'GET' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // POST\n  async post<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'POST',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PUT\n  async put<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PUT',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PATCH\n  async patch<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PATCH',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // DELETE\n  async delete<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'DELETE' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // File upload (multipart)\n  async upload<T>(\n    endpoint: string,\n    file: File,\n    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>,\n    options?: ApiOptions\n  ): Promise<T> {\n    const apiUrl = resolveApiBaseUrl();\n    let url = endpoint;\n    if (options?.tenantSlug) {\n      url = url.replace('/api/', `/api/${options.tenantSlug}/`);\n    }\n\n    if (options?.sucursalId) {\n      const separator = url.includes('?') ? '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${options.sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const formData = new FormData();\n    formData.append('file', file);\n    if (metadata) {\n      formData.append('metadata', JSON.stringify(metadata));\n    }\n\n    const headers: HeadersInit = {};\n    if (this.token) {\n      headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}${url}`, {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers,\n      body: formData,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Upload failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json();\n    return data as T;\n  }\n}\n\nexport const '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const headers = new Headers(options.headers ?? {});\n\n    if (!(options.body instanceof FormData)) {\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n    }\n\n    const token = this.token || readAuthToken();\n    if (token) {\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(url, {\n      ...options,\n      headers,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Request failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    return data as T;\n  }\n\n  // GET\n  async get<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'GET' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // POST\n  async post<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'POST',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PUT\n  async put<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PUT',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PATCH\n  async patch<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PATCH',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // DELETE\n  async delete<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'DELETE' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // File upload (multipart)\n  async upload<T>(\n    endpoint: string,\n    file: File,\n    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>,\n    options?: ApiOptions\n  ): Promise<T> {\n    const apiUrl = resolveApiBaseUrl();\n    let url = endpoint;\n    if (options?.tenantSlug) {\n      url = url.replace('/api/', `/api/${options.tenantSlug}/`);\n    }\n\n    if (options?.sucursalId) {\n      const separator = url.includes('?') ? '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${options.sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const formData = new FormData();\n    formData.append('file', file);\n    if (metadata) {\n      formData.append('metadata', JSON.stringify(metadata));\n    }\n\n    const headers: HeadersInit = {};\n    if (this.token) {\n      headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}${url}`, {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers,\n      body: formData,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PUT\n  async put<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PUT',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PATCH\n  async patch<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PATCH',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // DELETE\n  async delete<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'DELETE' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // File upload (multipart)\n  async upload<T>(\n    endpoint: string,\n    file: File,\n    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>,\n    options?: ApiOptions\n  ): Promise<T> {\n    const apiUrl = resolveAdminApiBaseUrl();\n    let url = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;\n    if (options?.tenantSlug) {\n      url = url.replace('/api/', `/api/${options.tenantSlug}/`);\n    }\n\n    if (options?.sucursalId) {\n      const separator = url.includes('?') ? exchangeSupabaseSession(accessToken);\n  apiClient.setToken(token);\n\n  saveAuthToken(token, true);\n  localStorage.setItem('srf_token', token);\n  localStorage.setItem('srf_user', JSON.stringify(user));\n  localStorage.setItem('srf_tenant', JSON.stringify(tenant));\n\n  return { token, user, tenant };\n}\n\nexport function logout() {\n  apiClient.clearToken();\n  clearAuthToken();\n  localStorage.removeItem('srf_token');\n  localStorage.removeItem('srf_user');\n  localStorage.removeItem('srf_tenant');\n  localStorage.removeItem('srf_sucursal_activa');\n  window.location.href = '/login';\n}\n\nexport function getStoredToken(): string | null {\n  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return null;\n  return localStorage.getItem('srf_token') || session.tenantId,\n      tenantSlug: session.tenantSlug,\n      sucursalId: session.sucursalId ?? null,\n      sessionId: session.token,\n    };\n  }\n  const user = (typeof window === 'undefined') return null;\n  const session = getCurrentSession();\n  if (session) {\n    return {\n      id: session.tenantId,\n      slug: session.tenantSlug,\n      name: JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PUT\n  async put<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PUT',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PATCH\n  async patch<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PATCH',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // DELETE\n  async delete<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'DELETE' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // File upload (multipart)\n  async upload<T>(\n    endpoint: string,\n    file: File,\n    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>,\n    options?: ApiOptions\n  ): Promise<T> {\n    const apiUrl = resolveAdminApiBaseUrl();\n    let url = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;\n    if (options?.tenantSlug) {\n      url = url.replace('/api/', `/api/${options.tenantSlug}/`);\n    }\n\n    if (options?.sucursalId) {\n      const separator = url.includes('?') ? const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/api${url}`, {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers,\n      body: formData,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await } from '@/types';\n\ninterface LoginResponse {\n  token: string;\n  user: User;\n  tenant: Tenant;\n}\n\ninterface ExchangeResponse {\n  token: string;\n  user: User;\n  tenant: Tenant;\n}\n\nexport async function exchangeSupabaseSession(accessToken: string): Promise<ExchangeResponse> {\n  const apiUrl = resolveAdminApiBaseUrl();\n\n  const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/api/auth/exchange`, {\n    method: 'POST',\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n    body: JSON.stringify({ accessToken }),\n  });\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Exchange failed' }));\n    throw new Error(error.error || 'Authentication failed');\n  }\n\n  const data = await response.json();\n  return {\n    token: data.token,\n    user: data.user,\n    tenant: data.tenant,\n  };\n}\n\nexport async function loginWithSupabase(accessToken: string): Promise<LoginResponse> {\n  const { token, user, tenant } = await exchangeSupabaseSession(accessToken);\n  apiClient.setToken(token);\n\n  saveAuthToken(token, true);\n  localStorage.setItem('srf_token', token);\n  localStorage.setItem('srf_user', JSON.stringify(user));\n  localStorage.setItem('srf_tenant', JSON.stringify(tenant));\n\n  return { token, user, tenant };\n}\n\nexport function logout() {\n  apiClient.clearToken();\n  clearAuthToken();\n  localStorage.removeItem('srf_token');\n  localStorage.removeItem('srf_user');\n  localStorage.removeItem('srf_tenant');\n  localStorage.removeItem('srf_sucursal_activa');\n  window.location.href = '/login';\n}\n\nexport function getStoredToken(): string | null {\n  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return null;\n  return localStorage.getItem('srf_token') || readAuthToken();\n}\n\nexport function getStoredUser(): User | null {\n  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return null;\n  const session = getCurrentSession();\n  if (session) {\n    return {\n      id: session.email || session.tenantId,\n      email: session.email,\n      name: session.email || 'Usuario activo',\n      role: (session.role as User['role']) || 'manager',\n      tenantId: session.tenantId,\n      tenantSlug: session.tenantSlug,\n      sucursalId: session.sucursalId ?? null,\n      sessionId: session.token,\n    };\n  }\n  const user = localStorage.getItem('srf_user');\n  if (!user) return null;\n  try {\n    return JSON.parse(user);\n  } catch {\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function getStoredTenant(): Tenant | null {\n  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return null;\n  const session = getCurrentSession();\n  if (session) {\n    return {\n      id: session.tenantId,\n      slug: session.tenantSlug,\n      name: apps/web-admin/.next/dev/static/chunks/_034s_ng._.js.map:    {"offset": {"line": 290, "column": 0}, "map": {"version":3,"sources":["file:///Users/jesusvilla/Desktop/Sdmx-pagina-principal/apps/web-admin/src/lib/api-client.ts"],"sourcesContent":["import { readAuthToken } from '@/lib/auth-storage';\nimport { resolveApiBaseUrl } from '@white-label/config';\n\ninterface ApiOptions {\n  tenantSlug?: string;\n  sucursalId?: string | null;\n}\n\nclass ApiClient {\n  private token: string | null = null;\n\n  setToken(token: string) {\n    this.token = token;\n  }\n\n  clearToken() {\n    this.token = null;\n  }\n\n  private async request<T>(\n    endpoint: string,\n    options: RequestInit = {},\n    apiOptions: ApiOptions = {}\n  ): Promise<T> {\n    const { tenantSlug, sucursalId } = apiOptions;\n    const apiUrl = resolveApiBaseUrl();\n    let url = endpoint.startsWith('http') ? endpoint : `${apiUrl}${endpoint}`;\n\n    // Inject tenantSlug in path if needed\n    if (tenantSlug && !url.includes('/:tenantSlug')) {\n      url = url.replace('/api/', `/api/${tenantSlug}/`);\n    }\n\n    // Add sucursalId as query param if provided\n    if (sucursalId) {\n      const separator = url.includes('?') ? '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const headers = new Headers(options.headers ?? {});\n\n    if (!(options.body instanceof FormData)) {\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n    }\n\n    const token = this.token || readAuthToken();\n    if (token) {\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(url, {\n      ...options,\n      headers,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Request failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    return data as T;\n  }\n\n  // GET\n  async get<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'GET' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // POST\n  async post<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'POST',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PUT\n  async put<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PUT',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PATCH\n  async patch<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PATCH',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // DELETE\n  async delete<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'DELETE' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // File upload (multipart)\n  async upload<T>(\n    endpoint: string,\n    file: File,\n    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>,\n    options?: ApiOptions\n  ): Promise<T> {\n    const apiUrl = resolveApiBaseUrl();\n    let url = endpoint;\n    if (options?.tenantSlug) {\n      url = url.replace('/api/', `/api/${options.tenantSlug}/`);\n    }\n\n    if (options?.sucursalId) {\n      const separator = url.includes('?') ? '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${options.sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const formData = new FormData();\n    formData.append('file', file);\n    if (metadata) {\n      formData.append('metadata', JSON.stringify(metadata));\n    }\n\n    const headers: HeadersInit = {};\n    if (this.token) {\n      headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}${url}`, {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers,\n      body: formData,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Upload failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json();\n    return data as T;\n  }\n}\n\nexport const '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const headers = new Headers(options.headers ?? {});\n\n    if (!(options.body instanceof FormData)) {\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n    }\n\n    const token = this.token || readAuthToken();\n    if (token) {\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(url, {\n      ...options,\n      headers,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Request failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    return data as T;\n  }\n\n  // GET\n  async get<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'GET' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // POST\n  async post<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'POST',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PUT\n  async put<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PUT',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // PATCH\n  async patch<T>(endpoint: string, body?: unknown, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(\n      endpoint,\n      {\n        method: 'PATCH',\n        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      },\n      options\n    );\n  }\n\n  // DELETE\n  async delete<T>(endpoint: string, options?: ApiOptions): Promise<T> {\n    return this.request<T>(endpoint, { method: 'DELETE' }, options);\n  }\n\n  // File upload (multipart)\n  async upload<T>(\n    endpoint: string,\n    file: File,\n    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>,\n    options?: ApiOptions\n  ): Promise<T> {\n    const apiUrl = resolveAdminApiBaseUrl();\n    let url = endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : `/${endpoint}`;\n    if (options?.tenantSlug) {\n      url = url.replace('/api/', `/api/${options.tenantSlug}/`);\n    }\n\n    if (options?.sucursalId) {\n      const separator = url.includes('?') ? '&' : '?';\n      url = `${url}${separator}sucursalId=${options.sucursalId}`;\n    }\n\n    const formData = new FormData();\n    formData.append('file', file);\n    if (metadata) {\n      formData.append('metadata', JSON.stringify(metadata));\n    }\n\n    const headers: HeadersInit = {};\n    if (this.token) {\n      headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;\n    }\n\n    const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/api${url}`, {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers,\n      body: formData,\n    });\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Upload failed' }));\n      throw new Error(error.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    }\n\n    const data = await response.json();\n    return data as T;\n status?: 'active' | 'inactive' | 'all';\n};\n\ntype AdminUserRecord = {\n  id: string;\n  tenantId: string;\n  authUserId: string | null;\n  name: string;\n  fullName: string;\n  email: string;\n  phone: string | null;\n  role: UserRole | string;\n  displayRole?: string | null;\n  effectiveRole?: string | null;\n  activo: boolean;\n  is_active: boolean;\n  ultimo_acceso: string | null;\n  last_login_at: string | null;\n  sucursalId: string | null;\n  createdAt: string | null;\n  updatedAt: string | null;\n};\n\nimport { readAuthToken } from \"@/lib/auth-storage\";\nimport { clearAuthToken } from \"@/lib/auth-storage\";\nimport { getCurrentSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { getActiveScope } from \"@/lib/scope\";\nimport { enqueueOfflineRequest } from \"@/lib/pwa/offline-queue\";\nimport { resolveAdminApiBaseUrl } from \"@/lib/api-base-url\";\n\nclass FixService {\n  private get apiUrl() {\n    return resolveAdminApiBaseUrl();\n  }\n\n  private apiPath(path: string) {\n    const normalizedPath = path.startsWith('/') ? path : `/${path}`;\n    return `/api${normalizedPath}`;\n  }\n\n  private get tenantId() {\n    const session = getCurrentSession();\n    if (session?.tenantId) {\n      return session.tenantId;\n    }\n    throw new Error(\"Sesión inválida: tenant_id ausente\");\n  }\n\n  private getToken(): string {\n    if (typeof window === 'undefined') {\n      return '';\n    }\n    return readAuthToken() || '';\n  }\n\n  private getSucursalId() {\n    return getActiveScope()?.sucursalId ?? '';\n  }\n\n  private getScopeHeaders() {\n    const sucursalId = this.getSucursalId();\n    return sucursalId\n      ? {\n          'x-fixi-sucursal-id': sucursalId,\n          'x-sucursal-id': sucursalId,\n        }\n      : null;\n  }\n\n  private async request<T>(path: string, init: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {\n    const token = this.getToken();\n\n    if (!token) {\n      throw new Error('No hay sesión activa. Vuelve a iniciar sesión.');\n    }\n\n    const method = String(init.method ?? 'GET').toUpperCase();\n    const isMutation = !['GET', 'HEAD', 'OPTIONS'].includes(method);\n    const body = typeof init.body === 'string' ? init.body : null;\n\n    if (typeof navigator !== 'undefined' && !navigator.onLine && isMutation) {\n      const session = getCurrentSession();\n      await enqueueOfflineRequest({\n        tenantId: session?.tenantId ?? this.tenantId,\n        url: `${this.apiUrl}${path}`,\n        method,\n        headers: {\n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        },\n        body,\n      });\n      throw new Error('Acción guardada sin conexión. Se sincronizará al reconectar.');\n    }\n\n    let response: Response;\n    try {\n      const headers = new Headers(init.headers);\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n\n      const scopeHeaders = this.getScopeHeaders();\n      if (scopeHeaders) {\n        headers.set('x-fixi-sucursal-id', scopeHeaders['x-fixi-sucursal-id']);\n        headers.set('x-sucursal-id', scopeHeaders['x-sucursal-id']);\n      }\n\n      response = await fetch(`${this.apiUrl}${path}`, {\n        ...init,\n        headers,\n      });\n    } catch (err) {\n      // network or fetch-level error\n      throw new Error(`Network error: ${(err as Error).message}`);\n    }\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const payload = await response.json().catch(() => ({} as ApiErrorResponse));\n      // prefer structured payload messages when available\n      const message =\n        (payload && typeof (payload as any).message === 'string' && (payload as any).message) ||\n        (payload && typeof payload.error === 'string' && payload.error) ||\n        `HTTP ${response.status}`;\n      const details = (payload as ApiErrorResponse).details ? ` - ${JSON.stringify((payload as ApiErrorResponse).details)}` : '';\n\n      if (\n        response.status === 401 &&\n        /invalid token signature|token expired|session revoked|missing or invalid authorization header|unauthorized/i.test(message)\n      ) {\n        clearAuthToken();\n        if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {\n          window.location.replace('/login');\n        }\n      }\n\n      throw new Error(`${message}${details}`);\n    }\n\n    return response.json() as Promise<T>;\n  }\n\n  private normalizeCustomerRow(row: JsonRecord): JsonRecord {\n    return {\n      ...row,\n      name: String(row.name ?? row.full_name ?? ''),\n      full_name: String(row.full_name ?? row.name ?? ''),\n      phone: typeof row.phone === 'string' ? row.phone : '',\n      email: typeof row.email === 'string' ? row.email : '',\n    };\n  }\n\n  private normalizeServiceRequestRow(row: JsonRecord): ServiceRequestPayload {\n    const normalizedStatus = String(\n      row.normalized_status ??\n      row.status ??\n      'pendiente'\n    ).trim().toLowerCase();\n\n    return {\n      ...row,\n      normalized_status: normalizedStatus,\n      customer_name: String(row.customer_name ?? value = typeof reader.result === 'string' ? reader.result : '';\n        resolve(value);\n      };\n      reader.onerror = () => reject(new Error('No se pudo leer el archivo'));\n defaultLandingContent.primaryCtaHref,\n    secondaryCtaLabel: input?.secondaryCtaLabel?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.secondaryCtaLabel,\n    secondaryCtaHref: input?.secondaryCtaHref?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.secondaryCtaHref,\n    contactLabel: input?.contactLabel?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.contactLabel,\n    contactHref: input?.contactHref?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.contactHref,\n    seoTitle: input?.seoTitle?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.seoTitle,\n    seoDescription: input?.seoDescription?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.seoDescription,\n    services: Array.isArray(input?.services) && input?.services.length > 0 ? input.services : [emptyService],\n    socialLinks: Array.isArray(input?.socialLinks) && input?.socialLinks.length > 0 ? input.socialLinks : [emptySocial],\n    showMap: Boolean(input?.showMap),\n    mapEmbedUrl: input?.mapEmbedUrl?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.mapEmbedUrl,\n    showVideo: Boolean(input?.showVideo),\n    videoUrl: input?.videoUrl?.trim() || defaultLandingContent.videoUrl,\n  };\n}\n\nfunction toPublicHref(tenantSlug: string, href: string) {\n  if (!href) return \"#\";\n  if (href.startsWith(\"http://\") || href.startsWith(\"https://\") || href.startsWith(\"mailto:\") || href.startsWith(\"tel:\")) {\n    return href;\n  }\n  const normalized = href.startsWith(\"/\") ? href : `/${href}`;\n  return `/${encodeURIComponent(tenantSlug)}${normalized}`;\n}\n\nexport default function LandingSettingsPage() {\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [success, setSuccess] = useState(\"\");\n  const [settings, setSettings] = useState<TenantLandingSettings | null>(null);\n  const [landingContent, setLandingContent] = useState<LandingContent>(defaultLandingContent);\n  const [industryKey, setIndustryKey] = useState<string>(DEFAULT_INDUSTRY_KEY);\n\n  async function load() {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      setError(\"\");\n      const result = await fixService.getTenantLandingSettings();\n      setSettings(result.data);\n      setLandingContent(normalizeLandingContent(result.data.tenant.landing_content ?? null));\n      setIndustryKey(typeof result.data.tenant.industry_profile?.industry_key === \"string\" ? result.data.tenant.industry_profile.industry_key : DEFAULT_INDUSTRY_KEY);\n    } catch (err) {\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Error al cargar la landing\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    void load();\n  }, []);\n\n  const tenantSlug = settings?.tenant.slug ?? \"\";\n  const preview = useMemo(() => ({\n    primaryHref: toPublicHref(tenantSlug, landingContent.primaryCtaHref),\n    secondaryHref: toPublicHref(tenantSlug, landingContent.secondaryCtaHref),\n    contactHref: toPublicHref(tenantSlug, landingContent.contactHref),\n  }), [landingContent.contactHref, landingContent.primaryCtaHref, landingContent.secondaryCtaHref, tenantSlug]);\n\n  const updateField = <K extends keyof LandingContent>(key: K, value: LandingContent[K]) => {\n    setLandingContent((current) => ({ ...current, [key]: value }));\n  };\n\n  const updateService = (index: number, key: keyof LandingService, value: string) => {\n    setLandingContent((current) => ({\n      ...current,\n      services: current.services.map((service, idx) => (idx === index ? { ...service, [key]: value } : service)),\n    }));\n  };\n\n  const updateSocial = (index: number, key: keyof SocialLink, value: string) => {\n    setLandingContent((current) => ({\n      ...current,\n      socialLinks: current.socialLinks.map((item, idx) => (idx === index ? { ...item, [key]: value } : item)),\n    }));\n  };\n\n  const addService = () => setLandingContent((current) => ({ ...current, services: [...current.services, { ...emptyService }] }));\n  const addSocial = () => setLandingContent((current) => ({ ...current, socialLinks: [...current.socialLinks, { ...emptySocial }] }));\n\n  async function handleSave() {\n    setSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    setSuccess(\"\");\n\n    try {\n      const selectedIndustry = settings?.availableIndustries?.find((item) => item.key === industryKey) ?? null;\n      const result = await fixService.updateTenantLandingSettings({\n        branding: settings?.tenant.branding ?? undefined,\n        landingContent,\n        industryProfile: {\n          industry_key: industryKey,\n          industry_label: selectedIndustry?.label ?? settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.industry_label ?? null,\n          asset_label: settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.asset_label ?? null,\n          order_label: settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.order_label ?? null,\n          request_label: settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.request_label ?? null,\n          customer_label: settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.customer_label ?? null,\n          portal_label: settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.portal_label ?? null,\n          quote_label: settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.quote_label ?? null,\n          default_workflow_key: selectedIndustry?.defaultWorkflowKey ?? settings?.tenant.industry_profile?.default_workflow_key ?? \"service_orders\",\n          is_active: true,\n          metadata: { source: \"dashboard_landing_editor\" },\n        },\n      });\n\n      setSettings(result.data);\n      setLandingContent(normalizeLandingContent(result.data.tenant.landing_content ?? null));\n      setSuccess(\"Landing guardada correctamente.\");\n    } catch (err) {\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Error al guardar landing\");\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return <div className=\"flex h-full items-center justify-center\"><div className=\"spinner w-8 h-8\" /></div>;\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <div className=\"flex flex-col gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between\">\n        <div>\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-orbitron font-bold text-srf-primary\">Landing</h1>\n          <p className=\"mt-1 text-sm text-srf-muted\">Configura la landing pública del tenant {settings?.tenant.name ?? tenantSlug}.</p>\n        </div>\n        <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n          <button onClick={() => void load()} className=\"btn-outline inline-flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <RefreshCw className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n            Recargar\n          </button>\n          <button onClick={() => void handleSave()} className=\"btn-primary inline-flex items-center gap-2\" disabled={saving}>\n            <Save className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n            {saving ? \"Guardando...\" : \"Guardar\"}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {error ? <div className=\"rounded-lg border border-red-500/30 bg-red-500/10 p-3 text-sm className=\"grid gap-6 xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1.5fr)_minmax(360px,1fr)]\">\n        <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n          <div className=\"card space-y-4\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-srf-primary\"><Globe className=\"w-5 h-5\" /><h2 className=\"text-lg font-semibold\">Hero</h2></div>\n            <div className=\"grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2\">\n              <input value={landingContent.heroTitle} onChange={(e) => updateField(\"heroTitle\", e.target.value)} className=\"input\" placeholder=\"Título principal\" />\n              <input value={landingContent.heroDescription} onChange={(e) => updateField(\"heroDescription\", e.target.value)} className=\"input min-h-28 md:col-span-2\" placeholder=\"Descripción principal\" />\n   isTrialActive: boolean;\n    isBillingBlocked: boolean;\n    daysLeft: number | null;\n    upgradeHref: string | null;\n  };\n};\n\ntype TaskPayload = {\n  title: string;\n  description?: string;\n 'all';\n};\n\ntype UserRole = 'admin' | 'operador' | 'tecnico' | 'cliente' | 'compras';\n\ntype AuditLogRecord = {\n  id: string;\n  tenant_id: string;\n  user_id: string | null;\n  action: string;\n  ip_address: string | null;\n  user_agent: string | null;\n  data_before: JsonRecord | null;\n  data_after: JsonRecord | null;\n  created_at: string;\n};\n\ntype SecuritySessionRecord = {\n  id: string;\n    full_name?: string;\n    email: string;\n    role: string;\n  } | null;\n};\n\ntype UserQueryParams = {\n  page?: number;\n  pageSize?: number;\n  q?: string;\n  role?: string;\n  status?: 'active' | 'inactive' | 'all';\n};\n\ntype AdminUserRecord = {\n  id: string;\n  tenantId: string;\n  authUserId: string | null;\n  name: string;\n  fullName: string;\n  email: string;\n  phone: string | null;\n  role: UserRole | string;\n  displayRole?: string | null;\n  effectiveRole?: string | null;\n  activo: boolean;\n  is_active: boolean;\n  ultimo_acceso: string | null;\n  last_login_at: string | null;\n  sucursalId: string | null;\n  createdAt: string | null;\n  updatedAt: string | null;\n};\n\nimport { readAuthToken } from \"@/lib/auth-storage\";\nimport { clearAuthToken } from \"@/lib/auth-storage\";\nimport { getCurrentSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { getActiveScope } from \"@/lib/scope\";\nimport { enqueueOfflineRequest } from \"@/lib/pwa/offline-queue\";\nimport { resolveAdminApiBaseUrl } from \"@/lib/api-base-url\";\n\nclass FixService {\n  private get apiUrl() {\n    return resolveAdminApiBaseUrl();\n  }\n\n  private apiPath(path: string) {\n    const normalizedPath = path.startsWith('/') ? path : `/${path}`;\n    return `/api${normalizedPath}`;\n  }\n\n  private get tenantId() {\n    const session = getCurrentSession();\n    if (session?.tenantId) {\n      return session.tenantId;\n    }\n    throw new Error(\"Sesión inválida: tenant_id ausente\");\n  }\n\n  private getToken(): string {\n    if (typeof window === 'undefined') {\n      return '';\n    }\n    return readAuthToken() || '';\n  }\n\n  private getSucursalId() {\n    return getActiveScope()?.sucursalId ?? '';\n  }\n\n  private getScopeHeaders() {\n    const sucursalId = this.getSucursalId();\n    return sucursalId\n      ? {\n          'x-fixi-sucursal-id': sucursalId,\n          'x-sucursal-id': sucursalId,\n        }\n      : null;\n  }\n\n  private async request<T>(path: string, init: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {\n    const token = this.getToken();\n\n    if (!token) {\n      throw new Error('No hay sesión activa. Vuelve a iniciar sesión.');\n    }\n\n    const method = String(init.method ?? 'GET').toUpperCase();\n    const isMutation = !['GET', 'HEAD', 'OPTIONS'].includes(method);\n    const body = typeof init.body === 'string' ? init.body : null;\n\n    if (typeof navigator !== 'undefined' && !navigator.onLine && isMutation) {\n      const session = getCurrentSession();\n      await enqueueOfflineRequest({\n        tenantId: session?.tenantId ?? this.tenantId,\n        url: `${this.apiUrl}${path}`,\n        method,\n        headers: {\n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        },\n        body,\n      });\n      throw new Error('Acción guardada sin conexión. Se sincronizará al reconectar.');\n    }\n\n    let response: Response;\n    try {\n      const headers = new Headers(init.headers);\n      headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');\n      headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);\n\n      const scopeHeaders = this.getScopeHeaders();\n      if (scopeHeaders) {\n        headers.set('x-fixi-sucursal-id', scopeHeaders['x-fixi-sucursal-id']);\n        headers.set('x-sucursal-id', scopeHeaders['x-sucursal-id']);\n      }\n\n      response = await fetch(`${this.apiUrl}${path}`, {\n        ...init,\n        headers,\n      });\n    } catch (err) {\n      // network or fetch-level error\n      throw new Error(`Network error: ${(err as Error).message}`);\n    }\n\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      const payload = await response.json().catch(() => ({} as ApiErrorResponse));\n      // prefer structured payload messages when available\n      const message =\n        (payload && typeof (payload as any).message === 'string' && (payload as any).message) ||\n        (payload && typeof payload.error === 'string' && payload.error) ||\n        `HTTP ${response.status}`;\n      const details = (payload as ApiErrorResponse).details ? ` - ${JSON.stringify((payload as ApiErrorResponse).details)}` : '';\n\n      if (\n        response.status === 401 &&\n        /invalid token signature|token expired|session revoked|missing or invalid authorization header|unauthorized/i.test(message)\n      ) {\n        clearAuthToken();\n        if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {\n          window.location.replace('/login');\n        }\n      }\n\n      throw new Error(`${message}${details}`);\n    }\n\n    return response.json() as Promise<T>;\n  }\n\n  private normalizeCustomerRow(row: JsonRecord): JsonRecord {\n    return {\n      ...row,\n      name: String(row.name ?? row.full_name ?? ''),\n      full_name: String(row.full_name ?? row.name ?? ''),\n      phone: typeof row.phone === 'string' ? row.phone : '',\n      email: typeof row.email === 'string' ? row.email : '',\n    };\n  }\n\n  private normalizeServiceRequestRow(row: JsonRecord): ServiceRequestPayload {\n    const normalizedStatus = String(\n      row.normalized_status ??\n      row.status ??\n      'pendiente'\n    ).trim().toLowerCase();\n\n    return {\n      ...row,\n      normalized_status: normalizedStatus,\n      customer_name: String(row.customer_name ?? ''),\n      customer_phone: typeof row.customer_phone === 'string' ? row.customer_phone : '',\n      customer_email: typeof row.customer_email === 'string' ? row.customer_email : null,\n      device_type: typeof row.device_type === 'string' ? row.device_type : null,\n      device_model: typeof row.device_model === 'string' ? row.device_model : null,\n      issue_description: typeof row.issue_description === 'string' ? row.issue_description : null,\n      metadata: (row.metadata as Record<string, unknown> | undefined) ?? undefined,\n      status: typeof row.status === 'string' ? row.status : normalizedStatus,\n      quoted_total: Number(row.quoted_total ?? 0),\n      deposit_amount: Number(row.deposit_amount ?? 0),\n      balance_amount: Number(row.balance_amount ?? 0),\n    };\n  }\n\n  private normalizeOrderRow(row: JsonRecord): JsonRecord {\n    const deviceInfo = (row.device_info as Record<string, unknown> | undefined) ?? {};\n    const deviceModel = String(\n      row.device_model ??\n      deviceInfo.model ??\n      deviceInfo.brand ??\n      ''\n    );\n    const deviceType = String(\n      row.device_type ??\n      deviceInfo.type ??\n      ''\n    );\n\n    return {\n      ...row,\n      device_model: deviceModel,\n      device_type: deviceType,\n      device_info: {\n        ...(deviceInfo ?? {}),\n        model: String(deviceInfo.model ?? deviceModel ?? ''),\n        brand: String(deviceInfo.brand ?? ''),\n        type: String(deviceInfo.type ?? deviceType ?? ''),\n        customer_name: String(deviceInfo.customer_name ?? row.clientName ?? row.customer_name ?? ''),\n        customer_phone: String(deviceInfo.customer_phone ?? row.clientPhone ?? row.customer_phone ?? ''),\n        customer_email: String(deviceInfo.customer_email ?? row.clientEmail ?? row.customer_email ?? ''),\n      },\n      estimated_cost: Number(row.estimated_cost ?? 0),\n      final_cost: Number(row.final_cost ?? 0),\n      status: String(row.status ?? 'recibido'),\n    };\n  }\n\n  private normalizeSupplierRow(row: JsonRecord): JsonRecord {\n    return {\n      ...row,\n      id: String(row.id ??
